title: Slow Your Roll
description: A mod about slowing down game progression
body:
![Slow Your Roll](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9eae0cd1c30f81155fdad58249ed07ab16c1ce8b.png)

## Description
*Slow Your Roll* adds a number of features aimed at slowing down the progression of the game.  These include more difficult crafting recipes for some items (including books, the eye of ender, and all tools and armor), and various other changes.

### Features:
- Flint and copper tools: replacing wooden and stone tools, with copper mineable by flint tools and iron mineable by copper tools
- Bark item, obtained from stripping wood, that can be re-applied to stripped logs
- A copper armor set 
- Unbaked versions of Minecraft's baked goods 
- Netherite horse armor
- Stack size limitations for food
- In-game documentation is available via [Treatise](https://modrinth.com/mod/treatise) if installed
- In-game configuration is available via [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) if installed
- [Bronze](https://modrinth.com/mod/bronze) mod compatibility is available via [Slow Your Bronze](https://modrinth.com/mod/slow-your-bronze)
- If you'd like some cool alternate flint tool textures, try [Slow Your Flint](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/slow-your-flint)

## Support
If you have a bug report, feature request, or any other type of issue, please post on our GitHub [issues page](https://github.com/DentedLeft/Dented-Modding/issues).  This is an issues page for all of our mods, so be sure to include the mod's name and version in your post.  We appreciate all feedback!

If you'd like to support development, you can leave a tip at our [BuyMeACoffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/dentedleft).  Only if it's within your means- otherwise, using, sharing, and enjoying the mod is support enough.  Thank you!
